title: plantago alpina var. incana
intro: Plantago alpina var. incana is a variety of the alpine plantain, a species of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and treat digestive issues. The health benefits of Plantago alpina var. incana include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to bronchial congestion.
